Removal of Restrictions on the Transfer of Officers Between the Active and Inactive National Guard, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 113–66, div. A, title V, § 512127 Stat. 752Pub. L. 114–328, div. A, title V, § 514130 Stat. 2113Dec. 26, 2013Dec. 23, 2016“(a).—Army National GuardDuring the period ending on , under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Army:December 31, 2019“(1)An officer of the Army National Guard who fills a vacancy in a federally recognized unit of the Army National Guard may be transferred from the active Army National Guard to the inactive Army National Guard.“(2)An officer of the Army National Guard transferred to the inactive Army National Guard pursuant to paragraph (1) may be transferred from the inactive Army National Guard to the active Army National Guard to fill a vacancy in a federally recognized unit.“(b).—Air National GuardDuring the period ending on , under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Air Force:December 31, 2019“(1)An officer of the Air National Guard who fills a vacancy in a federally recognized unit of the Air National Guard may be transferred from the active Air National Guard to the inactive Air National Guard.“(2)An officer of the Air National Guard transferred to the inactive Air National Guard pursuant to paragraph (1) may be transferred from the inactive Air National Guard to the active Air National Guard to fill a vacancy in a federally recognized unit.”
